exercises.audioScript: The hearing is going on in the court.
exercises.hindiScript: अदालत में सुनवाई चल रही है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Purple colour is considered royal.
There should be no delay in justice.
The sky looks blue.
The hearing is going on in the court.
exercises.answer: The hearing is going on in the court.

dictationPassage.text: The hearing is going on in the court. The judge announced the verdict. The lawyer argued the case. The law is equal for everyone. There should be no delay in justice.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: अदालत में सुनवाई चल रही है। जज ने फैसला सुनाया। वकील ने बहस की। कानून सबके लिए समान है। न्याय में देरी नहीं होनी चाहिए।
